div.h1: Algorithm: Device Node Creation for Minimal /dev
div.p: Standard Mode: S_IFCHR | 0666 (Character Device, World Read/Write) Context: Populating container rootfs /dev mount point via mknod
Syscall: mknod("null", S_IFCHR|0666, makedev(1, 3)) Function: Data sink; discards all input.
Syscall: mknod("zero", S_IFCHR|0666, makedev(1, 5)) Function: Infinite stream of NULL bytes (\0).
Syscall: mknod("urandom", S_IFCHR|0666, makedev(1, 9)) Function: Non-blocking entropy source.
Syscall: mknod("random", S_IFCHR|0666, makedev(1, 8)) Function: High-quality blocking entropy source.
Syscall: mknod("tty", S_IFCHR|0666, makedev(5, 0)) Function: Alias for current process's terminal.
